title: GNM Jobs 2026 – Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More
org: Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More Posts
shortInfo: Chief Medical and Health Office Dantewada (CMHO Dantewada) Recruitment 2026 for 23 posts of Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More. Candidates with BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, BDS, BPT, D.Pharm, B.Sc. Nursing/GNM, Graduate, 10th Pass Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CMHO Dantewada official website.

basic_details.job_title: CMHO Dantewada Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 23 Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Chief Medical and Health Office Dantewada
basic_details.post_name: Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical and Health Office Dantewada (CMHO Dantewada) Recruitment 2026 for 23 posts of Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More. Candidates with BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, BDS, BPT, D.Pharm, B.Sc. Nursing/GNM, Graduate, 10th Pass Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CMHO Dantewada official website.

application_fee.details: Medical Posts: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 70 years. Managerial Posts: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 64 years. Security Guard: Minimum Age: 21 years, Maximum Age: 40 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST is 5 years.

age_limit.maximum_age: Min: 18, Max: 70 years (Medical Posts), 64 years (Managerial Posts), 40 years (Security Guard)
age_limit.age_details: Min: 18, Max: 70 years (Medical Posts), 64 years (Managerial Posts), 40 years (Security Guard)
age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the CMHO Dantewada Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, BDS, BPT, D.Pharm, B.Sc. Nursing/GNM, DTYDHH, Graduate with DCA, 10th Pass
qualification.details: Medical Officer (RBSK) (Only Male): BHMS/BAMS/BUMS Degree, Registration from any Gol Recognized (BHMS/BAMS/BUMS) Ayush, Homeo, Unani Registration Board. Dental Surgeon: MDS with Registration Chhattisgarh Medical Council is compulsory. OR BDS with Registration Chhattisgarh Medical Council is compulsory. Physiotherpist: Bachelor's Degree in Physiotherapy (B.P.T). Pharmacist: Degree Or Diploma in Pharmacy (50%) & Registration in Pharmacy Registration Council. Staff Nurse (SNCU): B.Sc. Nursing OR GNM Course Passed & Live Registration in Chhattisgarh Nursing Registration Council. Tech Assistant-Hearing impaired Children: Diploma in Training Young Deaf and Hearing Handicapped (DTYDHH) from RCI Recognized Institute. Secretrial Assistant (SNCU): Graduate with at least 1 Year Diploma in Computer Application. Security Guard: 10th Passed.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMHO Dantewada to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for CMHO Dantewada Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the CMHO Dantewada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 04 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for CMHO Dantewada Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 23 vacancies available for various posts under the Chief Medical and Health Office Dantewada recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Security Guard post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Security Guard post is 10th Pass.

faq.question: What is the age limit for Medical Posts in CMHO Dantewada Recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for Medical Posts is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 70 years.

faq.question: What is the application fee for Unreserved category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for Unreserved category candidates is Rs. 300.00.

faq.question: What is the salary for a Dental Surgeon post?
faq.answer: The salary for a Dental Surgeon post is Rs. 27500/- per month.

faq.question: Can candidates apply through offline mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, candidates can only apply online through the official website. Applications received through any other medium will not be accepted.

faq.question: What is the selection process for CMHO Dantewada Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Screening, Interview, Skill Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: What is the starting date for online applications?
faq.answer: The online application process starts from 21 May 2026.

faq.question: Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates for the Security Guard post?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates for the Security Guard post.
